spec.name: On The King's Road Outside A Castle
spec.description: You are standing on the King's Road. Before you is a large Castle, evidently built not so much for strength as for beauty. It is not totally without defences, though, for it is surrounded by a deep moat, and its windows are just narrow slits for archers to shoot through. To the north there is a drawbridge across the moat.

west.description: The King's Road continues in a straight line to the west.
